_meta.purpose: v2 SOURCE supplement — entities the BRD IMPLIED (via Directus) but never declared. There is NO Directus on v2; this declares our own identity table. Robot 1 (derive_specs) reads this alongside the BRD and maps the old 'directus_users' references to 'users'.
_meta.frozen: 2026-06-26 — founder-approved (option A). The role list below is FROZEN here.
_meta.auth_note: The 'users' ENTITY is declared now so the data-model graph resolves. Its AUTH BEHAVIOUR (login, RBAC, sessions) is built LAST (auth-last). Declaring the entity is not building auth.
_meta.source: roles from company questionnaire Q11 + BRD sections 02 (Actors) / 03 (Roles)

fields.name: role
fields.rule: required; one of the frozen role list
